allow: Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./package.json'\); console.log\('nativewind:', p.dependencies.nativewind\); console.log\('tailwindcss:', p.dependencies.tailwindcss\); console.log\('@tailwindcss/postcss:', p.dependencies['@tailwindcss/postcss']\);")

Bash(node -e "const data = require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); const versions = JSON.parse\(data\); const v5 = versions.filter\(v => v.startsWith\('5.'\)\); console.log\('v5 versions:', v5.slice\(-10\)\);")
